# CodeGate Documentation

> Document index for AI/LLM discovery and retrieval. Access this file at `/en/llms.txt` when viewing the site in English.

## Guide

- [CodeGate Overview](/en): Lightweight activation code, invite code, and verification code management - REST API and multi-language SDK
- [Quick start](/en/quickstart): Install CodeGate and verify your first activation code in four steps
- [llms.txt](/en/llms): Entry page for llms.txt - for AI/LLM discovery and indexing of CodeGate docs

## SDK

- [Python SDK](/en/sdk/python): CodeGate Python client - code listing, verify, reactivate
- [JavaScript SDK](/en/sdk/javascript): CodeGate JavaScript/TypeScript client - code listing, verify, reactivate

## API reference

- [API reference](/en/api-reference/introduction): CodeGate REST API - API Key + HMAC signature authentication
- [Get project](/en/api-reference/endpoint/get-project): Get project details and statistics
- [List codes](/en/api-reference/endpoint/list-codes): List codes with pagination, filters and search
- [Get code by ID](/en/api-reference/endpoint/get-code): Get one code by ID
- [Get code by code string](/en/api-reference/endpoint/get-code-by-code): Get one code by code string
- [Verify (redeem) code](/en/api-reference/endpoint/verify): Verify a code for the project
- [Reactivate code](/en/api-reference/endpoint/reactivate): Reset a used code to unused
- [Statistics](/en/api-reference/endpoint/statistics): Project statistics

## AI tools (contributors)

- [Cursor setup](/en/ai-tools/cursor): Configure Cursor to write and maintain CodeGate docs (contributor guide)
- [Claude Code setup](/en/ai-tools/claude-code): Configure Claude Code to write and maintain CodeGate docs (contributor guide)
- [Windsurf setup](/en/ai-tools/windsurf): Configure Windsurf to write and maintain CodeGate docs (contributor guide)
